vocab.example: 他是唯一通过考试的人。
舞台上呈现出一幅美丽的画面。
大家都沉浸在胜利的喜悦中。
强烈的阳光刺得我睁不开眼。
我们为他的优秀表现感到骄傲。
他们的表演赢得了精彩的掌声。
夜幕降临，街道上亮起了路灯。
观众们挥舞着手里的荧光棒。
我们都在盼望假期的到来。
夜空中绽放着五彩缤纷的烟花。
作为一个新加坡人，我感到很自豪。

sentences.text: 晶莹的泪水，像断了线的珍珠，滚下她的脸颊。
sentences.description: Sparkling tears rolled down her cheeks like a broken string of pearls.

sentences.text: 于是，我装出若无其事的样子，走进屋里。
sentences.description: Pretending as if nothing had happened while walking into the room.

sentences.text: 盼望已久的假期终于来到了，我早就精心制订了假期计划。
sentences.description: Long-awaited vacation finally arrived with a meticulously prepared plan.

sentences.text: 购物中心的货物琳琅满目，看得人眼花缭乱。
sentences.description: Dazzled by the overwhelming variety of goods in the shopping mall.

sentences.text: 不知不觉的，假期已接近尾声，可我的计划还只是计划。
sentences.description: The holiday is coming to an end, yet the plans remain unfulfilled.

著名.zh: 这座古老的花园是世界上非常著名的旅游观光景点之一。
著名.en: This ancient garden is one of the very famous tourist attractions in the world.

著名.zh: 这位著名的科学家在医学领域做出了巨大的历史贡献。
著名.en: This famous scientist made huge historical contributions in the medical field.

著名.zh: 许多慕名而来的游客都想品尝一下这家著名餐厅的招牌菜。
著名.en: Many tourists drawn by fame want to taste the signature dish of this famous restaurant.

著名.zh: 著名画家将在下个月举行他个人近年来的最新作品展。
著名.en: The famous painter will hold an exhibition of his personal latest works in recent years next month.

著名.zh: 这篇著名的小说已经被改编成多部影视剧和舞台剧。
著名.en: This famous novel has been adapted into multiple film, television, and stage plays.

排列.zh: 图书馆里的书籍都是按照字母顺序整整齐齐排列好的。
排列.en: The books in the library are all neatly arranged in alphabetical order.

排列.zh: 队伍里的同学们按照身高高矮有序地排列成一条直线。
排列.en: The students in the line are orderly arranged into a straight line according to height.

排列.zh: 货架上排列着琳琅满目的商品，吸引着顾客前来挑选。
排列.en: A dazzling array of goods is arranged on the shelves, attracting customers to pick and choose.

排列.zh: 老师让大家把这些打乱的卡片重新按照时间顺序排列。
排列.en: The teacher asked everyone to rearrange these scrambled cards in chronological order.

排列.zh: 夜空中的星星按照奇妙的图案排列着，显得分外美丽。
排列.en: The stars in the night sky are arranged in wonderful patterns, looking exceptionally beautiful.

气氛.zh: 精彩的表演立刻把现场的节日气氛推向了最高潮。
气氛.en: The brilliant performance immediately pushed the local festival atmosphere to its climax.

气氛.zh: 经过大家幽默的开玩笑，会议室里紧张的气氛缓和了下来。
气氛.en: After everyone's humorous jokes, the tense atmosphere in the meeting room eased up.

气氛.zh: 这家咖啡馆装饰得非常温馨，给人一种安静舒适的气氛。
气氛.en: This cafe is decorated very warmly, giving people a quiet and comfortable atmosphere.

气氛.zh: 全家人围坐在一起过除夕，屋子里充满了融洽的气氛。
气氛.en: The whole family gathered together for New Year's Eve, and the room was filled with a harmonious atmosphere.

气氛.zh: 老师善于创造生动活泼的课堂气氛，提高学生的学习兴趣。
气氛.en: The teacher is good at creating a lively classroom atmosphere to increase students' interest in learning.

佳.zh: 中秋佳节是华人全家团聚、共同赏月的大好日子。
佳.en: The Mid-Autumn Festival is a wonderful day for Chinese families to reunite and admire the moon together.

佳.zh: 这部电影制作精良且演员演技出色，堪称一部佳作。
佳.en: This movie is well-produced with excellent acting, making it a fine masterpiece.

佳.zh: 经过评委们的严格评审，他最终获得了本次比赛的最佳奖。
佳.en: After strict review by judges, he ultimately won the best award in this competition.

佳.zh: 这个地方风景秀丽且空气清新，是避暑休闲的绝佳选择。
佳.en: This place has beautiful scenery and fresh air, making it an excellent choice for summer relaxation.

佳.zh: 看到他最近精神状态极佳，大家心里都感到非常高兴。
佳.en: Seeing that his mental state has been extremely good recently, everyone felt very happy in their hearts.

唯一.zh: 遇到问题时逃避不是解决问题的唯一方法，我们必须面对。
唯一.en: Escaping when encountering problems is not the only way to solve them; we must face them.

唯一.zh: 他是我在这次国际交流活动中结识的唯一一个外国朋友。
唯一.en: He is the only foreign friend I got to know during this international exchange activity.

唯一.zh: 经过反复核对，这是目前我们能够找到的唯一一份原始资料。
唯一.en: After repeated verification, this is currently the only original document we can find.

唯一.zh: 坚持不懈是实现人生理想的唯一途径，没有任何捷径。
唯一.en: Perseverance is the sole path to realizing life ideals; there are no shortcuts.

唯一.zh: 面对困境，团结一致是带领团队走出难关的唯一希望。
唯一.en: Faced with adversity, uniting as one is the sole hope of leading the team out of difficulty.

呈现.zh: 雨后的天空呈现出一道色彩斑斓且十分壮观的彩虹。
呈现.en: The sky after rain presented a colorful and very spectacular rainbow.

呈现.zh: 这幅画作向大家精彩地呈现了古代城市的繁华景象。
呈现.en: This painting brilliantly presented the bustling scene of an ancient city to everyone.

呈现.zh: 随着经济的快速发展，这座城市呈现出欣欣向荣的景象。
呈现.en: With rapid economic development, this city presents a thriving scene.

呈现.zh: 舞台上的灯光效果将唯美的意境完美地呈现了出来。
呈现.en: The lighting effects on stage perfectly presented the aesthetic mood.

呈现.zh: 调查报告向我们呈现了当前青年人的阅读习惯与偏好。
呈现.en: The survey report presented us with the reading habits and preferences of current young people.

沉浸.zh: 全校师生都沉浸在喜庆的节日欢快气氛之中。
沉浸.en: Teachers and students of the school were immersed in the joyous festive atmosphere.

沉浸.zh: 他完全沉浸在书本的世界里，连外面的敲门声都没听到。
沉浸.en: He was completely immersed in the world of books, not even hearing the knocking outside.

沉浸.zh: 听着悠扬的音乐，整个人不知不觉就沉浸在了美好的回忆中。
沉浸.en: Listening to melodious music, one unconsciously became immersed in beautiful memories.

沉浸.zh: 比赛获胜之后，整个团队都沉浸在无比激动的胜利喜悦里。
沉浸.en: After winning the match, the whole team was immersed in the incomparably excited joy of victory.

沉浸.zh: 这部电影的剧情扣人心弦，让观众完全沉浸其中无法自拔。
沉浸.en: The plot of this movie is riveting, letting the audience immerse fully without being able to pull away.

刺.zh: 玫瑰花的花茎上长满了锋利的刺，摘采时一定要小心。
刺.en: The stems of rose flowers are full of sharp thorns; be careful when picking them.

刺.zh: 阳光十分刺眼，他忍不住伸手挡住了自己的眼睛。
刺.en: The sunlight was very dazzling, and he couldn't help reaching out to block his eyes.

刺.zh: 吃鱼的时候一定要细嚼慢咽，防止被鱼刺给卡住喉咙。
刺.en: When eating fish, chew slowly and swallow carefully to prevent being choked by fish bones.

刺.zh: 他刚才说的那番尖酸刻薄的话，深深地刺伤了我的心。
刺.en: Those harsh and sarcastic words he said just now deeply hurt my heart.

刺.zh: 寒冷的北风像一把把小刀子一样刺向行人的脸庞。
刺.en: The cold north wind poked at the pedestrians' faces like little knives.

骄傲.zh: 即使取得了优异的成绩，我们也不能产生骄傲自满的情绪。
骄傲.en: Even if superior results are achieved, we cannot generate proud and self-satisfied emotions.

骄傲.zh: 看到自己的孩子获得冠军，父母心里感到无比骄傲和自豪。
骄傲.en: Seeing their child win the championship, parents felt incomparably proud in their hearts.

骄傲.zh: 骄傲使人落后，虚心使人进步，这是永恒不变的道理。
骄傲.en: Pride makes one fall behind, humility makes one progress; this is an eternal truth.

骄傲.zh: 这位年轻的选手凭借出色的表现，成为了全村人的骄傲。
骄傲.en: This young contestant became the pride of the whole village by virtue of outstanding performance.

骄傲.zh: 他因为自己的骄傲大意，最终在决赛中输给了对手。
骄傲.en: Because of his own pride and carelessness, he ultimately lost to his opponent in the finals.

表演.zh: 演员们在舞台上精彩的表演赢得了全场观众的阵阵掌声。
表演.en: The actors' brilliant performance on stage won bursts of applause from the entire audience.

表演.zh: 学校决定在下个星期五举办一年一度的文艺汇演活动。
表演.en: The school decided to hold the annual art performance event next Friday.

表演.zh: 杂技演员在空中完成了许多高难度的表演动作，惊艳全场。
表演.en: The acrobats completed many highly difficult performance moves in the air, amazing the whole crowd.

表演.zh: 他在戏剧中的表演自然流畅，将角色刻画得入木三分。
表演.en: His performance in the drama was natural and fluent, portraying the character vividly.

表演.zh: 小朋友们穿上漂亮的服装，在舞台上表演起了欢快的舞蹈。
表演.en: The children put on beautiful costumes and performed a cheerful dance on the stage.

降临.zh: 当夜幕渐渐降临的时候，城市里的霓虹灯陆陆续续亮了起来。
降临.en: When nightfall gradually descended, the neon lights in the city lit up one after another.

降临.zh: 新生命的降临给这个原本安静的家庭带来了无尽的喜悦。
降临.en: The arrival of a new life brought endless joy to this originally quiet family.

降临.zh: 灾难突然降临的时候，人们展现出了互帮互助的大爱精神。
降临.en: When disaster suddenly descended, people showed a great spirit of mutual help.

降临.zh: 随着冬天的降临，大地披上了一层白茫茫的厚厚冰雪。
降临.en: With the arrival of winter, the earth put on a layer of vast, thick white ice and snow.

降临.zh: 大家都祈祷幸福与好运能够早日降临到这个困苦的家庭。
降临.en: Everyone prayed that happiness and good luck could descend upon this struggling family as early as possible.

荧光棒.zh: 演唱会现场，粉丝们高举着手中的荧光棒随音乐摇摆。
荧光棒.en: At the concert venue, fans held fluorescent sticks high in their hands, swaying with the music.

荧光棒.zh: 在漆黑的夜空下，闪烁的荧光棒宛如一片璀璨的星海。
荧光棒.en: Under the pitch-black night sky, the blinking glow sticks were like a bright ocean of stars.

荧光棒.zh: 工作人员在入口处向入场的观众分发五彩缤纷的荧光棒。
荧光棒.en: Staff members handed out colorful glow sticks to entering audience members at the entrance.

荧光棒.zh: 孩子们手里挥舞着荧光棒，在公园的草地上快乐地奔跑。
荧光棒.en: Children waved glow sticks in their hands, running happily on the park lawn.

荧光棒.zh: 挥舞荧光棒是大型晚会上烘托现场气氛的重要工具之一。
荧光棒.en: Waving glow sticks is one of the important tools to foster atmosphere at large evening galas.

盼望.zh: 漫长的学期终于结束了，同学们一直盼望着的假期来到了。
盼望.en: The long semester finally ended, and the holiday students had been longing for arrived.

盼望.zh: 远在异国他乡的游子，无时无刻不在苦苦盼望与家人团聚。
盼望.en: Travelers far away in a foreign land long bitterly for reunion with family at every moment.

盼望.zh: 农民们盼望这场久旱之后的雨水能够拯救田里的农作物。
盼望.en: Farmers hope this rain after a long drought can save the crops in the fields.

盼望.zh: 经过长达数年的等待，他终于盼望到了事业成功的这一天。
盼望.en: After years of waiting, he finally got to see the day of career success he longed for.

盼望.zh: 孩子们满心欢喜地盼望圣诞老人会在半夜送来精美的礼物。
盼望.en: Children long with joyous hearts for Santa Claus to deliver exquisite gifts in the middle of the night.

夜幕.zh: 每当夜幕降临的时候，这条繁华的街市就开始热闹起来。
夜幕.en: Whenever nightfall descends, this bustling market street begins to become lively.

夜幕.zh: 笼罩在夜幕中的古老城堡显得分外神秘且充满传奇色彩。
夜幕.en: The ancient castle shrouded in nightfall looked exceptionally mysterious and full of legendary color.

夜幕.zh: 警车在广阔的夜幕下疾驰，迅速赶往事故发生的第一现场。
夜幕.en: The police car sped under the vast blanket of night, quickly rushing to the scene of the accident.

夜幕.zh: 随着夜幕渐渐拉开，天边泛起了微弱而美丽的绚丽晨光。
夜幕.en: As the curtain of night gradually parted, faint and beautiful morning light emerged at the horizon.

夜幕.zh: 我们站在山顶上，静静地欣赏着夜幕笼罩下城市万家灯火。
夜幕.en: Standing on the hilltop, we quietly admired the city lights under the nightfall.

战斗机.zh: 几架先进的战斗机在国庆庆典阅兵式上划过蔚蓝的天空。
战斗机.en: Several advanced fighter jets streaked across the blue sky during the National Day parade.

战斗机.zh: 飞行员驾驶着性能优越的战斗机在空中完成高难度的动作。
战斗机.en: The pilot flew a fighter jet with superior performance, completing difficult maneuvers in the air.

战斗机.zh: 这款新型战斗机配备了最顶尖的雷达系统以及电子设备。
战斗机.en: This new type of fighter jet is equipped with top-of-the-line radar systems and electronic equipment.

战斗机.zh: 看到超音速战斗机从头顶飞过，人群中爆发出热烈的欢呼。
战斗机.en: Seeing the supersonic fighter jet fly overhead, warm cheers erupted from the crowd.

战斗机.zh: 军事博物馆里展示着许多在历史上服役过的退役战斗机。
战斗机.en: The military museum displays many retired fighter jets that served in history.

五彩缤纷.zh: 节日里的广场上升起了五彩缤纷的气球，好看极了。
五彩缤纷.en: Colorful balloons rose above the square during the festival, looking extremely pretty.

五彩缤纷.zh: 春天到了，花园里开满了五彩缤纷的花朵，散发着阵阵香气。
五彩缤纷.en: Spring has arrived, and the garden is full of colorful flowers blooming, giving off bursts of fragrance.

五彩缤纷.zh: 夜空里绽放出五彩缤纷的烟花，吸引了无数市民驻足观赏。
五彩缤纷.en: Colorful fireworks bloomed in the night sky, attracting countless citizens to stop and watch.

五彩缤纷.zh: 海底世界里生活着各式各样、五彩缤纷的热带鱼类。
五彩缤纷.en: Tropical fish of various kinds and vibrant colors live in the underwater world.

五彩缤纷.zh: 舞台上的灯光变得五彩缤纷，为舞蹈表演增添了梦幻色彩。
五彩缤纷.en: The lights on stage became colorful, adding a dreamy color to the dance performance.

自豪.zh: 能够代表国家参加这次国际比赛，他感到无比地自豪。
自豪.en: Being able to represent the country in this international competition, he felt incomparably proud.

自豪.zh: 看到学校培养出了这么多优秀的人才，校长脸上洋溢着自豪。
自豪.en: Seeing the school cultivate so many outstanding talents, the principal's face beamed with pride.

自豪.zh: 我们为自己博大精深的历史文化底蕴而感到深深的自豪。
自豪.en: We feel deeply proud of our extensive and profound historical and cultural heritage.

自豪.zh: 他用自豪的语气向同学们介绍了自己家乡近年的巨大变化。
自豪.en: He introduced the huge changes in his hometown in recent years to his classmates in a proud tone.

自豪.zh: 经过长期的艰苦努力，她终于凭借个人实力赢得了让父母自豪的荣誉。
自豪.en: After long period of hard work, she finally won honor that made her parents proud with her personal strength.

宽阔.zh: 一条宽阔平坦的水泥大道直通新建成的社区综合中心。
宽阔.en: A wide and flat concrete avenue leads straight to the newly built community center.

宽阔.zh: 站在山顶俯瞰，前方是一片无比宽阔的大草原和蔚蓝天空。
宽阔.en: Standing on the peak looking down, ahead is an incomparably vast prairie and blue sky.

宽阔.zh: 做人要拥有宽阔的胸怀，学会容纳别人的不同意见。
宽阔.en: To be a person, one must have a broad mind and learn to accommodate different opinions from others.

宽阔.zh: 这条宽阔的河流孕育了流域两岸丰富的农业和历史文明。
宽阔.en: This wide river gave birth to rich agriculture and historical civilization along both banks.

宽阔.zh: 宽阔的操场上，同学们正在欢快地奔跑、踢足球。
宽阔.en: On the broad playground, classmates are running and playing football happily.
